acceptance_criteria: Checkpoint retention policy limits storage growth with configurable max per phase
MergeConflict state does not set completed_at prematurely
Phase plans loaded from workflow-config.v2.json with hardcoded fallback
Automated test coverage for checkpoint pruning and state transitions
description: Workflow checkpoints grow unbounded (1500+ per workflow, ~277KB each). MergeConflict state incorrectly sets completed_at. Phase plans are hardcoded instead of loaded from config. Address storage, semantic correctness, and configurability.
title: Harden workflow engine storage and state consistency
